mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and PKC signaling to reduce AML cell proliferation
additional_notes: Described as PKC/FLT3 multikinase; approved in AML combination therapy.

mechanism: Inhibits RAF/VEGFR and FLT3 signaling pathways
additional_notes: Noted as used off-label in FLT3-ITD AML.

mechanism: Inhibits multiple receptor tyrosine kinases including FLT3
additional_notes: Mentioned with repurposing literature in AML.

mechanism: Inhibits VEGFR and PDGFR signaling
additional_notes: Reported activity in some AML contexts.

mechanism: Inhibits SRC family kinases and ABL to suppress signaling in AML subsets
Blocks JAK-STAT pathway signaling driven by cytokine dependence
Inhibits MEK1/2 in the MAPK pathway
additional_notes: Described as downstream MAPK pathway targeting.

mechanism: Inhibits mTORC1 signaling affecting growth/survival pathways
additional_notes: AML pathway dependence noted in subsets.

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylases to alter transcription and reduce proliferation
Inhibits histone deacetylases; generally more potent HDAC inhibitor
additional_notes: Text notes optional extension up to 3 µM if needed.

category: HDAC modulator (weak HDAC inhibitor; active at mM)
mechanism: Exerts HDAC-related epigenetic effects at millimolar concentrations
Inhibits ALDH; reported copper-dependent cytotoxicity in AML
additional_notes: Often tested ± 1–5 µM CuCl2 as a parallel condition.

mechanism: Activates retinoic acid receptors to induce differentiation programs
additional_notes: Alternative name: ATRA; noted as light sensitive; subset activity outside APL.

mechanism: Inhibits BCL-2 to promote apoptosis
additional_notes: Text suggests extending to 1 µM if resistant; approved AML combination therapy.

mechanism: Inhibits anti-apoptotic BCL-2 family proteins BCL-2 and BCL-XL
additional_notes: Alternative name mentioned: ABT-263; noted broader but more toxic.

mechanism: Induces oxidative stress and apoptosis
additional_notes: Noted mainly for APL but with broader effects.

mechanism: Impairs mitochondrial complex I and activates AMPK-related metabolic stress
additional_notes: Commonly requires mM concentrations to see in vitro effects; modest single-agent.

mechanism: Inhibits HMG-CoA reductase, affecting mevalonate/cholesterol biosynthesis and signaling
additional_notes: Noted sensitization/anti-proliferation reports in AML; top 30 µM.

mechanism: Disrupts tubulin polymerization affecting mitosis
Reported to modulate Hedgehog signaling/angiogenesis and cellular trafficking in cancer repurposing contexts
